message:
🐛 Fix EPG case mismatch, anchor settings to sidebar, 2s search debounce (#82)

- Fix EPG lookup: tvgId case mismatch (M3U lowercase vs XMLTV CamelCase)
  Now uses lowercase keys in rawToPrefixed map for reliable matching
- Settings button anchored to bottom of sidebar on all platforms
- Search debounce increased to 2s so search waits until user stops typing

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
